hero.heading: Hi, I'm Santanu.
hero.subheading: I design and build considered interfaces for the web.
hero.description: For the last decade I've been shaping frontends at Webspiders — from pixel-perfect theming to large React, Vue and Next.js systems on headless Drupal. I care about typography, performance, and code that ages well.

about.title: A frontend practice, ten years in.
description: I'm a frontend architect based in Kolkata. For the past decade I've led frontend at Webspiders Pvt. Ltd, shipping enterprise web platforms for clients in India, Singapore and beyond.

My day-to-day spans the full frontend stack — modular React and Vue 3 component systems, Next.js App Router patterns (SSR, ISR, dynamic routing), and headless Drupal integrations over REST / JSON:API.
Outside the stack, I care about the craft: accessible markup, sustainable patterns, sensible performance budgets, and interfaces that feel calm rather than loud.
highlights: Core Web Vitals and performance budgets
AI-assisted workflows with Copilot, Claude, Cursor

roles.title: Frontend Developer → Frontend Architect
bullets: Led end-to-end frontend for enterprise and SaaS products.
Translated Figma systems into modular React and Vue components.
Built headless Drupal + React / Next.js frontends on REST and JSON:API.
Raised Lighthouse scores and tightened Core Web Vitals across projects.
Mentored junior developers on component architecture and code quality.

roles.title: HTML Developer
bullets: Built mobile-optimized landing pages for paid campaigns.
Improved product page UX, navigation and checkout flow.
Fixed frontend and cross-browser issues across the site.

roles.title: HTML Developer
bullets: Built client websites with a focus on responsive layout.
Applied accessibility and performance best practices.

contact.title: Say hello.
contact.description: I'm open to select frontend roles and collaborations. The fastest way to reach me is email.
